title: Andy Burnham to promise to ‘fix the big things’ in first speech as Labour leader
description: Burnham, who is set to take the job on Friday, will promise to give back control to communities and spread growth
content:
Andy Burnham will pledge he has the “courage to fix the big things that politics has neglected” in his first speech as Labour leader.

title: World Cup 2026: Fifa 'assessing reports' after Argentina players hold Falklands banner
description: Fifa is "assessing the match reports" before deciding whether to punish Argentina after players held a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.
content:
Fifa is "assessing match reports" before deciding whether to punish Argentina after players celebrated their World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.

title: Review case of Warrington woman shot by father in Texas, says MP
description: Lucy Harrison, 23, was alone in a room with her father in Texas when she was shot dead in January 2025.
content:
An MP has called for the government to put pressure on Texas authorities to reopen the case of a British woman shot dead by her father in the US.
Lucy Harrison, 23, of Warrington, Cheshire, was alone in a room with her father, Kris Harrison, at his h... [592 chars]

title: Earth-like exoplanet could have life-supporting water on its surface
description: Scientists discover the first confirmed atmosphere in habitable zone outside our solar system on LHS 1140b
content:
The search for life outside our solar system has taken another twist as researchers revealed they have discovered an atmosphere around an Earth-like planet 49 light years away that could have liquid water on its surface.

title: ‘Bizarre choice’: business and Labour puzzle over Shabana Mahmood as future chancellor
description: The home secretary, favourite to take over at No 11, has minimal economic credentials and many MPs would prefer Ed Miliband
content: Andy Burnham last month promised the UK he would bring “good growth in every postcode and hope in every heart” when he is installed as prime minister. Britain’s industry leaders also have a hope in their hearts: that Burnham will install a pro-busine... [6053 chars]
